Lu Xun ÁõßťĀú
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Xun (ÁõßťĀú). Officer of later-Shu. Defeated Zhong Hui at Nanzheng, but was later killed by Xun Kai. Lu Xun was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Lu Xun lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
